description: Convert the brain queue from subprocess-exit completion to swarm-owned leased completion with git-evidence verification. Adds task states (leased, in_progress), a lease sweeper, and a confirm-complete check that rejects false-positive 'done' from reconciler drift.

phases.description: Extend the brain-task JSON value schema. Add status variants leased and in_progress. Add leased_to, leased_until, lease_attempts, swarm_task_id, evidence.commits, evidence.reconcile_verdict. Backfill defaults for existing pending tasks.
phases.name: Schema extension — add leased/in_progress states + lease fields

tasks.description: In hex-cli/src/commands/sched.rs introduce a typed `BrainTaskStatus` enum (Pending, Leased, InProgress, Completed, Failed) replacing the current string-typed status. Derive serde with lowercase. Add lease fields to the task value struct. Migrate read paths (list_brain_tasks, update_brain_task) to the new shape; tolerate missing fields on read.
tasks.name: Schema + serde enum

phases.description: Replace the current `drain_brain_tasks` + `execute_brain_task` direct-subprocess flow with: (a) pop pending task, (b) create or attach HexFlo swarm, (c) register task inside swarm with swarm_task_id, (d) stamp leased_to + leased_until, (e) flip status to Leased. Swarm agents then progress the task through InProgress.

gate.command: cargo check --workspace && cargo test -p hex-cli brain::dispatch

phases.name: Dispatch path — dequeue → create swarm → lease

tasks.description: Define const LEASE_DURATIONS: [(&str, Duration)] = [ ("workplan", 30*60), ("hex-command", 5*60), ("shell", 2*60), ("remote-shell", 60) ]. Helper fn lease_for(kind) -> Duration.
tasks.name: Lease durations per kind

tasks.description: New `dispatch_brain_task(task) -> Result<LeaseHandle>`: POSTs to /api/swarms to create (or reuses) a `brain-lease` swarm; POSTs a swarm task with hexflo_task_id referencing the brain task id; PATCHes the brain task with status=Leased, leased_to, leased_until, swarm_task_id. Return LeaseHandle containing ids for the sweeper. Replace the call site in the daemon tick loop.
tasks.name: Dispatcher replaces direct execute

tasks.description: For kinds `shell` and `hex-command`, dispatch_brain_task skips the swarm round-trip but still stamps Leased + leased_until (short lease). The kind ACK path still runs the same confirm-complete check. This preserves latency for trivial tasks.
tasks.name: Lightweight kinds bypass swarm

phases.description: Introduce `confirm_complete(task, subprocess_result) -> CompletionVerdict`. For workplan kind, run `hex plan reconcile <path>` and check EVERY step has evidence.commits non-empty. For hex-command + shell, exit-code + stderr pattern check. Return Verdict::Complete { evidence } | Verdict::Failed { reason } | Verdict::StillRunning.
phases.name: Confirm-complete check

tasks.description: In a new fn `confirm_workplan(path: &Path) -> CompletionVerdict`: invoke `hex plan reconcile --update <path>` as subprocess; parse JSON (add --json flag to reconcile if missing); for every step ensure `status == done && !evidence.commits.is_empty()`. If any step is pending OR done-without-commits, return Failed with the offending step ids.
tasks.name: Workplan confirmer

tasks.description: For hex-command: exit 0 AND stderr does not contain `error:`, `panicked`, `FAILED` (case-insensitive). For shell: just exit 0 (retains current semantics). Return Verdict accordingly.
tasks.name: hex-command + shell confirmer

tasks.description: Replace the call to `update_brain_task(id, if ok { completed } else { failed }, stdout)` with a call to confirm_complete(task, result) and dispatch to update accordingly. Completion writes evidence.commits back into the task JSON.
tasks.name: Wire confirmer into daemon loop

phases.description: Background task in the daemon loop that every 30s scans all tasks in Leased or InProgress state, and for each whose leased_until < now: fails the swarm task, increments lease_attempts, returns brain task to Pending (or Failed after 3 attempts). Emits priority-2 inbox notification (ADR-2604141100).

gate.command: cargo test -p hex-cli brain::sweeper && target/debug/hex brain queue list

phases.name: Lease sweeper

tasks.description: New fn `sweep_expired_leases() -> Result<usize>` (returns count swept). Called from the daemon tick before dispatch. For each expired task, PATCH brain task (status, lease_attempts). If attempts >= 3, status=Failed with reason `lease_max_attempts`.
tasks.name: Sweeper implementation

tasks.description: For each expired task, call notify_operator (already added in ADR-2604141100 P1) with priority=2 and body `lease expired for <task.kind>:<task.id> after {elapsed}s — attempt {n}/3`. If kind permanently fails, additional notification priority=2 body `task abandoned after 3 attempts`.
tasks.name: Sweeper notifications

phases.description: The pre-flight workplan reconciler must not transitively flip brain-task statuses to Completed. Audit call sites of update_brain_task; the only permitted callers are dispatch_brain_task (Leased), the confirm-complete path (Completed/Failed), and the sweeper (Failed/Pending).

gate.command: cargo test -p hex-cli brain::reconciler_isolation && ! grep -R 'update_brain_task' hex-cli/src/commands/plan.rs

phases.name: Firewall the reconciler

tasks.description: Make `update_brain_task` pub(in crate::commands::sched) scope-restricted to the sched module. Any plan/reconcile call sites that currently touch brain-task status must be deleted and replaced with workplan-task-only updates.
tasks.name: Access-control audit

tasks.description: Integration test reproducing today's incident: enqueue a workplan whose tasks touch files that already exist on disk (so reconciler would flip them done without git evidence); assert the brain task lands in Failed with reason mentioning missing evidence.commits, NOT Completed.
tasks.name: Integration test — false-positive reconciler

phases.description: Expose lease state in brain status output and hex brain queue list. Dashboard gets a leased-vs-in_progress breakdown.

gate.command: target/debug/hex brain status && target/debug/hex brain queue list

phases.name: Dashboard + status wiring

tasks.description: Add queue_leased + queue_in_progress to BrainStatus response (hex-nexus/src/routes/brain.rs). Update CLI rendering in sched.rs to show Leased / In-progress / Pending counts.
tasks.name: brain status leased count

tasks.description: `hex brain queue list` gains columns Status | Leased-to | Lease-expires-in. Color urgent when lease_expires_in < 30s.
tasks.name: Queue list columns
